creator: Z462vasa@mail.lviv.ua
text:
Good afternoon.

Can you write pkg upgrade so that certain programs are installed from ports and not downloaded ready.

When I install postfix but it is installed without mysql support. You have to look for what's broken and reassemble with handles. And pkg does not warn that there will be an incorrect installation or the program is built from ports.


I decide so

 pkg lock -l
Currently locked packages:
courier-imap-5.0.11,2
maildrop-3.0.1
mysql57-client-5.7.31
mysql57-server-5.7.31
postfix-3.5.8,1
